# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 激活特定技能
activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")
activate_skill("level-extract-developer")

# 试玩广告
activate_skill("playable-ad-planner")
activate_skill("playable-ad-developer")

# 游戏开发工作流
activate_skill("game-dev-planner")
activate_skill("game-dev-developer")
activate_skill("game-dev-debugger")

# AI 资产生成
activate_skill("generate_3d_model")
activate_skill("generate_animated_character")
activate_skill("generate_rigged_animated_model")
activate_skill("generate_sprite")
activate_skill("generate_sprite_sequence")
activate_skill("generate_image")
activate_skill("generate_material")
activate_skill("generate_skybox")
activate_skill("generate_audio_clip")
activate_skill("generate_sound_effect")
activate_skill("generate_terrain")
activate_skill("generate_video")
activate_skill("search_assets")

# AI 资产生产
activate_skill("fbx-humanoid-auto-rig")
activate_skill("place_assets_in_scene")

# 开发进化
activate_skill("log-analyzer")
activate_skill("session-profiler")

# Unity 专家
activate_skill("lighting")
activate_skill("cinemachine")
activate_skill("scene-creator")
activate_skill("ui-system-router")
```

## 技能依赖关系

```text
level-extract-planner → level-extract-developer
editor-plan-agent → editor-module-agent (关卡抽取子代理)

playable-ad-planner → playable-ad-developer

game-dev-planner → game-dev-developer → game-dev-debugger → log-analyzer → session-profiler

ai-generation-planner → 3d-model-generator | animated-character-generator | audio-generator | image-generator | material-generator | skybox-generator | sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator | search-assets | video-generator

generate_3d_model → place_assets_in_scene
generate_animated_character → place_assets_in_scene
generate_sprite → place_assets_in_scene
generate_terrain → place_assets_in_scene
search_assets → search-assets → place_assets_in_scene
generate_video → video-generator

2d-character → auto-wire
ui-system-router → imgui | ugui | ui-toolkit
```

# Comprehensive Tower Defense Codebase Analysis

## 1. Project Architecture Overview

This is a Unity 2D tower defense game (namespace `TowerDefense`) that is being migrated into a modular game platform ("sttop5") with:
- **`Assets/_Shared/`** - Shared infrastructure (module system, save system, player profile)
- **`Assets/_Modules/HomeBase/`** - Home base hub module (partially implemented)
- **`Assets/Scripts/`** - Tower defense game scripts (the legacy standalone game)

---

## 2. All C# Scripts and Their Responsibilities

### CORE (`Assets/Scripts/Core/`)

| File | Class & Name | Key Methods | Dependencies |
|------|-------------|-------------|--------------|
| `GameManager.cs` | `GameManager : Singleton<GameManager>` | `Awake()`, `Start()`, `LoadLevel()`, `StartGame()`, `PauseGame()`, `ResumeGame()`, `GameOver()`, `RestartGame()`, `AddGold()`, `SpendGold()`, `TakeDamage()`, `Heal()`, `IncrementWave()`, `AddKill()` | `LevelData`, `LevelBuilder`, `EventBus`, `PlayerLevelSystem`, `GameState` enum |
| `EventBus.cs` | `EventBus` (static) | `Subscribe<T>()`, `Unsubscribe<T>()`, `Publish<T>()` | None (pure static events) |
| `ObjectPool.cs` | `ObjectPool : Singleton<ObjectPool>` | `Get()`, `Return()`, `Preload()`, `ClearPool()`, `ClearAllPools()` | `Singleton` |
| `PlayerLevelSystem.cs` | `PlayerLevelSystem : Singleton<PlayerLevelSystem>` | `AddExp()`, `SetLevelData()`, `LoadFromSave()`, `PersistToSave()` | `SaveSystem`, `EventBus` |
| `PlayerWallet.cs` | `PlayerWallet : Singleton<PlayerWallet>` | `AddGold()`, `SpendGold()`, `AddDiamond()`, `SpendDiamond()`, `AddStamina()`, `SpendStamina()` | `EventBus` |
| `Singleton.cs` | `Singleton<T> : MonoBehaviour` | `Awake()`, `OnDestroy()`, static `Instance` property | None |

**Key Insight:** `GameManager` is the central orchestrator. It manages game state, gold, life, waves, and triggers scene loading via `SceneManager.LoadScene()`. It has its own `EventBus` reference pointing to `TowerDefense.Core.EventBus` (the static one from the legacy code, not the shared event bus).

---

## 3. How the Game is Initialized (Entry Points)

### Current Standalone Entry Point
The tower defense game has NO single bootstrapper. Entry depends on the scene:

**If loaded as "GameScene" scene (standalone):**
1. `GameManager.Awake()` → calls `InitializeGame()` (sets gold=500, life=20, state=Menu)
2. `GameManager.Start()` → checks if active scene is "GameScene", then calls `LoadLevel(0)`
3. `LoadLevel(0)` → reads `LevelData`, calls `LevelBuilder.BuildLevel()`, then `StartGame(totalWaves)`
4. `StartGame()` → sets state=Playing, `Time.timeScale=1`, fires `GameStartEvent`
5. `WaveManager` receives `GameStartEvent` via `EventBus` → calls `ForceStartWave()`

**If loaded as "MainMenu" scene:**
1. `MainMenuUI` displays level selection
2. Player clicks level → `SceneManager.LoadScene(levelData.sceneName)` (which is "GameScene" or similar)

### New Modular Entry Point (under development)
The `_Shared` infrastructure provides: `GameBootstrapper` → initializes `SceneLoader` and `ModuleManager` → loads "HomeScene" additively → `HomeManager` registers itself as a module → player can click PortalBuilding to enter "towerdefense" module.

---

## 4. Scene Management

### Scenes Referenced in Code (not found in filesystem)
- **"GameScene"** - Referenced in `GameManager.Start()`, `StartGameButton.OnStartGameClicked()`, `VictoryPanel.OnNextLevelClicked()`
- **"MainMenu"** - Referenced in `SettingsPanel.OnMainMenuClicked()`, `VictoryPanel.OnMainMenuClicked()`
- **"HomeScene"** - Referenced in `GameBootstrapper` (shared scene loader)
- **Scene files do not exist** in `Assets/Scenes/` - they are gitignored or not yet created

### Scene Loading Mechanism
- **Legacy:** Direct `SceneManager.LoadScene()` calls throughout the codebase
- **Shared:** `SceneLoader.LoadSceneAdditive()` for additive loading with callbacks
- **No scene exists in `Assets/Scenes/`** - scenes are either gitignored or stored elsewhere

### Relationship Between GameScene and MainMenu
They are separate scenes loaded via `SceneManager.LoadScene()`. No additive loading or data sharing between them. The `GameManager` singleton (marked `DontDestroyOnLoad`) persists across scene loads, carrying game state.

---

## 5. Key Manager Classes and Dependencies

### Legacy Managers (TowerDefense namespace)

| Manager | Type | Dependencies | Persists Across Scenes? |
|---------|------|-------------|------------------------|
| `GameManager` | `Singleton<GameManager>` | `LevelData[]`, `LevelBuilder`, `EventBus` | Yes (DontDestroyOnLoad) |
| `SaveSystem` | `Singleton<SaveSystem>` | Self-contained JSON save | Yes |
| `PlayerWallet` | `Singleton<PlayerWallet>` | `EventBus` | Yes |
| `PlayerLevelSystem` | `Singleton<PlayerLevelSystem>` | `SaveSystem`, `EventBus` | Yes |
| `WaveManager` | Static Instance | `EnemySpawner`, `GameManager`, `EventBus` | No (scene-scoped) |
| `BuildButtonManager` | Static Instance | `Canvas` | No |
| `ObjectPool` | `Singleton<ObjectPool>` | None | Yes |

### Shared Managers (Sttop5.Shared namespace)

| Manager | Type | Dependencies | Notes |
|---------|------|-------------|-------|
| `GameBootstrapper` | `Singleton<GameBootstrapper>` | `SceneLoader`, `ModuleManager` | Platform entry point |
| `SceneLoader` | `Singleton<SceneLoader>` | `SceneManager` | Additive scene loading |
| `ModuleManager` | `Singleton<ModuleManager>` | `SceneLoader`, `GameModule` | Module lifecycle |
| `PlayerProfile` | `Singleton<PlayerProfile>` | `SaveSystem`, `GlobalEventBus` | **NEW** shared player data |
| `SaveSystem` | `Singleton<SaveSystem>` | Module save data | **NEW** improved save system |
| `GameModule` | Abstract base class | EventBus | Module lifecycle |
| `HomeManager` | `GameModule` | `BuildingManager`, `ResourceManager`, `ModuleManager`, `SaveSystem` | HomeBase module |

---

## 6. Player Data / Save System References

### Duplicate Save Systems - CONFLICT
This is a critical issue. There are **two separate save systems** that compete:

**Legacy:** `Assets/Scripts/Save/SaveSystem.cs` (namespace `TowerDefense.Save`)
- Used by: `PlayerLevelSystem`, `PlayerWallet`, `QuestPanel`, `AchievementPanel`
- File: `savedata.json` in `Application.persistentDataPath/Save/`
- Structure: `GameSaveData` with `level`, `hero`, `settings`, `player`, `quest` sub-data

**Shared:** `Assets/_Shared/Save/SaveSystem.cs` (namespace `Sttop5.Shared.Save`)
- Used by: `HomeManager`, `PlayerProfile`, `ModuleManager`
- File: `gamesave.json` in `Application.persistentDataPath/Save/`
- Structure: `GameSaveData` with `version`, `player`, `settings`, `lastActiveModuleId`, `moduleData` (list of `ModuleSaveEntry`)

**The `PlayerWallet` and `PlayerLevelSystem`** have no save-game persistence except through the legacy `SaveSystem`. They do not persist to `PlayerProfile`.

---

## 7. UnityEngine.UI / Canvas References

The tower defense codebase has heavy Canvas/UI coupling:

1. **Hardcoded GameObject path lookups** (major migration blocker):
   ```csharp
   GameObject.Find("画布/塔选择面板")     // TowerSlot.cs
   GameObject.Find("画布/塔信息面板")      // TowerSlot.cs
   GameObject.Find("Canvas/TowerSelectPanel")  // TowerSlot.cs (fallback)
   GameObject.Find("Canvas/TowerInfoPanel")    // TowerSlot.cs (fallback)
   GameObject.Find("火把")                   // ShopPanel.cs, AchievementPanel.cs, QuestPanel.cs
   GameObject.Find("背景")                    // ShopPanel.cs, AchievementPanel.cs, QuestPanel.cs
   GameObject.Find("BuildSlots") / "建造槽"   // LevelBuilder.cs
   FindObjectOfType<Canvas>()                // LightningSkillController.cs
   ```

2. **Direct `FindObjectOfType<Canvas>()`** in:
   - `EnemyHealth.cs` - creates health bar UI
   - `BuildButtonManager.cs` - spawns build buttons
   - `LightningSkillController.cs` - creates screen flash UI

3. **UI element types used:** `Text`, `Image`, `Button`, `Slider`, `Toggle`, `Dropdown`, `Outline`, `CanvasGroup`, `ScrollRect` (implied)

---

## 8. Namespace Analysis for Module Migration

### Namespace Map

| Namespace | Files | Type |
|-----------|-------|------|
| `TowerDefense.Core` | 6 | Legacy core |
| `TowerDefense.Data` | 10 | Legacy data |
| `TowerDefense.Data.Config` | 3 | Legacy config |
| `TowerDefense.Enemy` | 6 | Legacy enemy |
| `TowerDefense.Hero` | 2 | Legacy hero |
| `TowerDefense.Map` | 2 | Legacy map |
| `TowerDefense.Save` | 2 | Legacy save |
| `TowerDefense.Skill` | 4 | Legacy skill |
| `TowerDefense.Tower` | 8 | Legacy tower |
| `TowerDefense.UI` | 15 | Legacy UI |
| `TowerDefense.Utils` | 3 | Legacy utils |
| `TowerDefense.Wave` | 1 | Legacy wave |
| `TowerDefense.Editor` | 1 | Legacy editor |
| `Sttop5.Shared.Core` | 5 | Shared infrastructure |
| `Sttop5.Shared.Save` | 2 | Shared save |
| `Sttop5.Shared.Player` | 1 | Shared player |
| `Sttop5.Modules.HomeBase` | 6 | HomeBase module |
| (global namespace) | 5 | Un-namespaced scripts |

---

## 9. What Needs to Change to Make it a Loadable Module Under HomeBase

### Critical Blockers

1. **No `GameModule` subclass exists for TowerDefense.** Need to create `TowerDefenseGameModule : GameModule` that:
   - Has `_moduleId = "towerdefense"`
   - Has `_sceneName = "GameScene"` (or whatever the tower defense scene is called)
   - Implements `GetModuleSaveData()` and `RestoreModuleSaveData()` for save/load
   - Overrides `Activate()` to initialize game state
   - Overrides `Deactivate()` to clean up

2. **Hardcoded scene references everywhere.** All direct `SceneManager.LoadScene()` calls need to be replaced by `SceneLoader.LoadSceneAdditive()` through the module system.

3. **Singleton management conflict.** There are two `Singleton` classes (legacy `TowerDefense.Core.Singleton` and shared `Sttop5.Shared.Core.Singleton`). These are separate and will result in duplicate manager instances if both initialize.

4. **Duplicate save systems.** `TowerDefense.Save.SaveSystem` and `Sttop5.Shared.Save.SaveSystem` both exist with different data structures. The tower defense game needs to migrate to the shared save system.

5. **Duplicate player data.** `TowerDefense.Data.PlayerWallet` + `TowerDefense.Data.PlayerLevelSystem` vs `Sttop5.Shared.Player.PlayerProfile`. The tower defense code should use `PlayerProfile` for cross-module persistence and `PlayerWallet`/`PlayerLevelSystem` only for in-game session state.

6. **Hardcoded GameObject path lookups.** `GameObject.Find("画布/...")` and `GameObject.Find("Canvas/...")` throughout UI scripts will break if the Canvas structure differs when loaded additively.

7. **Scene-dependent initialization.** `GameManager.Start()` checks `sceneName == "GameScene"` to auto-start the level. This logic needs to be triggered by the module system instead.

8. **Scene files are missing.** No `.unity` scene files exist in `Assets/Scenes/`. These need to be created.

### Key Migration Steps Summary

1. Create `TowerDefenseGameModule` class inheriting from `GameModule`
2. Migrate all `SceneManager.LoadScene()` calls to `SceneLoader.LoadSceneAdditive()`
3. Refactor UI to not use hardcoded path lookups (use serialized references or dependency injection)
4. Resolve the singleton conflict between legacy and shared Singletons
5. Migrate save data to use the shared `SaveSystem` with module save entries
6. Replace direct `PlayerWallet`/`PlayerLevelSystem` references with `PlayerProfile` for cross-module data
7. Register the tower defense module with `ModuleManager` during initialization
8. Create the actual Unity scene files

### Potential Circular Dependencies
- None detected explicitly, but the **dual singleton pattern** could cause initialization order issues if both `TowerDefense.Core.Singleton` and `Sttop5.Shared.Core.Singleton` instances reference each other
- `GameManager` references `WaveManager` (via static Instance) and vice versa (WaveManager calls GameManager) - this is fine as long as lifecycle is managed

---

## 10. Summary of Key Findings

- **68 C# scripts** in TowerDefense namespace, **9 in _Shared**, **10 in _Modules/HomeBase**
- **GameManager** is the central controller with tight coupling to scene management
- **Two parallel save systems** and **two parallel player data systems** exist - this is the **most critical issue** for module migration
- **Two separate Singleton implementations** exist in different namespaces
- **Heavy hardcoded GameObject.Find() calls** for UI references that will break under additive scene loading
- **No scene files exist** - the game references "GameScene" and "MainMenu" by name in code but the actual `.unity` files are missing (likely gitignored or not yet created)
- **AI folder is empty**
- **HomeBase module** already has the `PortalBuilding` concept that triggers `ModuleManager.ActivateModule()` - this is the intended entry point for the tower defense module
- **The wave/tower/enemy systems** are well-encapsulated in their own namespaces and should require relatively little refactoring for modularization

# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 激活特定技能
activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")
activate_skill("level-extract-developer")

# 试玩广告
activate_skill("playable-ad-planner")
activate_skill("playable-ad-developer")

# 游戏开发工作流
activate_skill("game-dev-planner")
activate_skill("game-dev-developer")
activate_skill("game-dev-debugger")

# AI 资产生成
activate_skill("generate_3d_model")
activate_skill("generate_animated_character")
activate_skill("generate_rigged_animated_model")
activate_skill("generate_sprite")
activate_skill("generate_sprite_sequence")
activate_skill("generate_image")
activate_skill("generate_material")
activate_skill("generate_skybox")
activate_skill("generate_audio_clip")
activate_skill("generate_sound_effect")
activate_skill("generate_terrain")
activate_skill("generate_video")
activate_skill("search_assets")

# AI 资产生产
activate_skill("fbx-humanoid-auto-rig")
activate_skill("place_assets_in_scene")

# 开发进化
activate_skill("log-analyzer")
activate_skill("session-profiler")

# Unity 专家
activate_skill("lighting")
activate_skill("cinemachine")
activate_skill("scene-creator")
activate_skill("ui-system-router")
```

## 技能依赖关系

```text
level-extract-planner → level-extract-developer
editor-plan-agent → editor-module-agent (关卡抽取子代理)

playable-ad-planner → playable-ad-developer

game-dev-planner → game-dev-developer → game-dev-debugger → log-analyzer → session-profiler

ai-generation-planner → 3d-model-generator | animated-character-generator | audio-generator | image-generator | material-generator | skybox-generator | sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator | search-assets | video-generator

generate_3d_model → place_assets_in_scene
generate_animated_character → place_assets_in_scene
generate_sprite → place_assets_in_scene
generate_terrain → place_assets_in_scene
search_assets → search-assets → place_assets_in_scene
generate_video → video-generator

2d-character → auto-wire
ui-system-router → imgui | ugui | ui-toolkit
```

## 文件结构

```text
unity-master-skills/
├── .gitignore
├── CODELY.md

# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 激活特定技能
activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")
activate_skill("level-extract-developer")

# 试玩广告
activate_skill("playable-ad-planner")
activate_skill("playable-ad-developer")

# 游戏开发工作流
activate_skill("game-dev-planner")
activate_skill("game-dev-developer")
activate_skill("game-dev-debugger")

# AI 资产生成
activate_skill("generate_3d_model")
activate_skill("generate_animated_character")
activate_skill("generate_rigged_animated_model")
activate_skill("generate_sprite")
activate_skill("generate_sprite_sequence")
activate_skill("generate_image")
activate_skill("generate_material")
activate_skill("generate_skybox")
activate_skill("generate_audio_clip")
activate_skill("generate_sound_effect")
activate_skill("generate_terrain")
activate_skill("generate_video")
activate_skill("search_assets")

# AI 资产生产
activate_skill("fbx-humanoid-auto-rig")
activate_skill("place_assets_in_scene")

# 开发进化
activate_skill("log-analyzer")
activate_skill("session-profiler")

# Unity 专家
activate_skill("lighting")
activate_skill("cinemachine")
activate_skill("scene-creator")
activate_skill("ui-system-router")
```

## 技能依赖关系

```text
level-extract-planner → level-extract-developer
editor-plan-agent → editor-module-agent (关卡抽取子代理)

playable-ad-planner → playable-ad-developer

game-dev-planner → game-dev-developer → game-dev-debugger → log-analyzer → session-profiler

ai-generation-planner → 3d-model-generator | animated-character-generator | audio-generator | image-generator | material-generator | skybox-generator | sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator | search-assets | video-generator

generate_3d_model → place_assets_in_scene
generate_animated_character → place_assets_in_scene
generate_sprite → place_assets_in_scene
generate_terrain → place_assets_in_scene
search_assets → search-assets → place_assets_in_scene
generate_video → video-generator

2d-character → auto-wire
ui-system-router → imgui | ugui | ui-toolkit
```

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")
activate_skill("level-extract-developer")

# 试玩广告
activate_skill("playable-ad-planner")
activate_skill("playable-ad-developer")

# 游戏开发工作流

activate_skill("game-dev-developer")
activate_skill("game-dev-debugger")

# AI 资产生成

activate_skill("generate_animated_character")
activate_skill("generate_rigged_animated_model")
activate_skill("generate_sprite")

activate_skill("place_assets_in_scene")

# 开发进化
activate_skill("log-analyzer")
activate_skill("session-profiler")

# Unity 专家
activate_skill("lighting")
activate_skill("cinemachine")
activate_skill("scene-creator")
activate_skill("ui-system-router")
```

## 技能依赖关系

```text
level-extract-planner → level-extract-developer
editor-plan-agent → editor-module-agent (关卡抽取子代理)

playable-ad-planner → playable-ad-developer

game-dev-planner → game-dev-developer → game-dev-debugger → log-analyzer → session-profiler

ai-generation-planner → 3d-model-generator | animated-character-generator | audio-generator | image-generator | material-generator | skybox-generator | sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator | search-assets | video-generator

generate_3d_model → place_assets_in_scene
generate_animated_character → place_assets_in_scene
generate_sprite → place_assets_in_scene
generate_terrain → place_assets_in_scene
search_assets → search-assets → place_assets_in_scene
generate_video → video-generator

2d-character → auto-wire
ui-system-router → imgui | ugui | ui-toolkit
```

---

# Comprehensive Tower Defense Codebase Analysis

## 1. Project Architecture Overview

This is a Unity 2D tower defense game (namespace `TowerDefense`) that is being migrated into a modular game platform ("sttop5") with:
- **`Assets/_Shared/`** - Shared infrastructure (module system, save system, player profile)
- **`Assets/_Modules/HomeBase/`** - Home base hub module (partially implemented)
- **`Assets/Scripts/`** - Tower defense game scripts (the legacy standalone game)

---

## 2. All C# Scripts and Their Responsibilities

### CORE (`Assets/Scripts/Core/`)

| File | Class & Name | Key Methods | Dependencies |
|------|-------------|-------------|--------------|
| `GameManager.cs` | `GameManager : Singleton<GameManager>` | `Awake()`, `Start()`, `LoadLevel()`, `StartGame()`, `PauseGame()`, `ResumeGame()`, `GameOver()`, `RestartGame()`, `AddGold()`, `SpendGold()`, `TakeDamage()`, `Heal()`, `IncrementWave()`, `AddKill()` | `LevelData`, `LevelBuilder`, `EventBus`, `PlayerLevelSystem`, `GameState` enum |
| `EventBus.cs` | `EventBus` (static) | `Subscribe<T>()`, `Unsubscribe<T>()`, `Publish<T>()` | None (pure static events) |
| `ObjectPool.cs` | `ObjectPool : Singleton<ObjectPool>` | `Get()`, `Return()`, `Preload()`, `ClearPool()`, `ClearAllPools()` | `Singleton` |
| `PlayerLevelSystem.cs` | `PlayerLevelSystem : Singleton<PlayerLevelSystem>` | `AddExp()`, `SetLevelData()`, `LoadFromSave()`, `PersistToSave()` | `SaveSystem`, `EventBus` |
| `PlayerWallet.cs` | `PlayerWallet : Singleton<PlayerWallet>` | `AddGold()`, `SpendGold()`, `AddDiamond()`, `SpendDiamond()`, `AddStamina()`, `SpendStamina()` | `EventBus` |
| `Singleton.cs` | `Singleton<T> : MonoBehaviour` | `Awake()`, `OnDestroy()`, static `Instance` property | None |

**Key Insight:** `GameManager` is the central orchestrator. It manages game state, gold, life, waves, and triggers scene loading via `SceneManager.LoadScene()`. It has its own `EventBus` reference pointing to `TowerDefense.Core.EventBus` (the static one from the legacy code, not the shared event bus).

### DATA (`Assets/Scripts/Data/`)

| File | Class | Type | Description |
|------|-------|------|-------------|
| `TowerData.cs` | `TowerData : ScriptableObject` | SO | Tower definitions with per-level stats, references to `SoldierData`, prefabs |
| `EnemyData.cs` | `EnemyData : ScriptableObject` | SO | Enemy definitions with stats, prefab reference |
| `LevelData.cs` | `LevelData : ScriptableObject` | SO | Level configuration with mapRows[], paths, tower slots, waves |
| `WaveData.cs` | `WaveData : ScriptableObject` | SO | Wave configuration with enemy groups |
| `SoldierData.cs` | `SoldierData : ScriptableObject` | SO | Soldier stats |
| `HeroData.cs` | `HeroData : ScriptableObject` | SO | Hero definitions with skills |
| `AchievementData.cs` | `AchievementData, AchievementItemData` | Serializable | Achievement definitions |
| `QuestItemData.cs` | `QuestData, QuestItemData` | Serializable | Quest definitions |
| `ShopItemData.cs` | `ShopData, ShopItemData` | Serializable | Shop item definitions |
| `Config/GameConfig.cs` | `GameConfig : ScriptableObject` | SO | Central game balance config |
| `Config/DataGenerator.cs` | `DataGenerator : EditorWindow` | Editor | Editor tool to generate data assets from `GameConfig` |
| `Config/TowerSlotDetector.cs` | `TowerSlotDetector : MonoBehaviour` | Component | Detects buildable tiles on Tilemap and spawns TowerSlot prefabs |

### ENEMY (`Assets/Scripts/Enemy/`)

| File | Class | Methods | Description |
|------|-------|---------|-------------|
| `Enemy.cs` | `Enemy : MonoBehaviour` | `Initialize()`, `StartMovement()`, `OnReachedEnd()`, `OnDeath()`, `TakeDamage()`, `ApplySlow()`, `ApplyStun()` | Main enemy controller - manages movement, health, death events, and references `GameManager` directly |
| `EnemyHealth.cs` | `EnemyHealth : MonoBehaviour` | `Initialize()`, `TakeDamage()`, `Die()` | Health management with health bar UI |
| `EnemyMovement.cs` | `EnemyMovement : MonoBehaviour` | `FollowPath()`, `ResumeMovement()`, `StopMovement()`, `Slow()`, `GetProgressPercent()` | Path-following movement with slow/stun support |
| `EnemySpawner.cs` | `EnemySpawner : MonoBehaviour` | `StartWave()`, `StopSpawning()`, `GetClosestEnemy()`, `GetEnemiesInRange()` | Wave-based enemy spawning with spawn queue |
| `EnemyAnimation.cs` | `EnemyAnimation : MonoBehaviour` | `PlayGetHitAnimation()`, `PlayDeathAnimation()` | Animation controller |
| `DamageType.cs` | `DamageType` enum | - | Physical, Magic, Explosion, Fire, Ice, Poison |

### HERO (`Assets/Scripts/Hero/`)

| File | Class | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `Hero.cs` | `Hero : MonoBehaviour` | Hero with state machine (Idle, Moving, Attacking, UsingSkill, Dead). Manages stats, leveling, skills, target finding, attack |
| `HeroController.cs` | `HeroController : MonoBehaviour` | Handles right-click movement and Q/W/E skill keys for the hero |

### MAP (`Assets/Scripts/Map/`)

| File | Class | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|

---

## 3. How the Game is Initialized (Entry Points)

### Current Standalone Entry Point
The tower defense game has NO single bootstrapper. Entry depends on the scene:

**If loaded as "GameScene" scene (standalone):**
1. `GameManager.Awake()` → calls `InitializeGame()` (sets gold=500, life=20, state=Menu)
2. `GameManager.Start()` → checks if active scene is "GameScene", then calls `LoadLevel(0)`
3. `LoadLevel(0)` → reads `LevelData`, calls `LevelBuilder.BuildLevel()`, then `StartGame(totalWaves)`
4. `StartGame()` → sets state=Playing, `Time.timeScale=1`, fires `GameStartEvent`
5. `WaveManager` receives `GameStartEvent` via `EventBus` → calls `ForceStartWave()`

**If loaded as "MainMenu" scene:**
1. `MainMenuUI` displays level selection
2. Player clicks level → `SceneManager.LoadScene(levelData.sceneName)` (which is "GameScene" or similar)

### New Modular Entry Point (under development)
The `_Shared` infrastructure provides: `GameBootstrapper` → initializes `SceneLoader` and `ModuleManager` → loads "HomeScene" additively → `HomeManager` registers itself as a module → player can click PortalBuilding to enter "towerdefense" module.

---

## 4. Scene Management

### Scenes Referenced in Code (not found in filesystem)
- **"GameScene"** - Referenced in `GameManager.Start()`, `StartGameButton.OnStartGameClicked()`, `VictoryPanel.OnNextLevelClicked()`
- **"MainMenu"** - Referenced in `SettingsPanel.OnMainMenuClicked()`, `VictoryPanel.OnMainMenuClicked()`
- **"HomeScene"** - Referenced in `GameBootstrapper` (shared scene loader)
- **Scene files do not exist** in `Assets/Scenes/` - they are gitignored or not yet created

### Scene Loading Mechanism
- **Legacy:** Direct `SceneManager.LoadScene()` calls throughout the codebase
- **Shared:** `SceneLoader.LoadSceneAdditive()` for additive loading with callbacks
- **No scene exists in `Assets/Scenes/`** - scenes are either gitignored or stored elsewhere

### Relationship Between GameScene and MainMenu
They are separate scenes loaded via `SceneManager.LoadScene()`. No additive loading or data sharing between them. The `GameManager` singleton (marked `DontDestroyOnLoad`) persists across scene loads, carrying game state.

---

## 5. Key Manager Classes and Dependencies

### Legacy Managers (TowerDefense namespace)

| Manager | Type | Dependencies | Persists Across Scenes? |
|---------|------|-------------|------------------------|
| `GameManager` | `Singleton<GameManager>` | `LevelData[]`, `LevelBuilder`, `EventBus` | Yes (DontDestroyOnLoad) |
| `SaveSystem` | `Singleton<SaveSystem>` | Self-contained JSON save | Yes |
| `PlayerWallet` | `Singleton<PlayerWallet>` | `EventBus` | Yes |
| `PlayerLevelSystem` | `Singleton<PlayerLevelSystem>` | `SaveSystem`, `EventBus` | Yes |
| `WaveManager` | Static Instance | `EnemySpawner`, `GameManager`, `EventBus` | No (scene-scoped) |
| `BuildButtonManager` | Static Instance | `Canvas` | No |
| `ObjectPool` | `Singleton<ObjectPool>` | None | Yes |

### Shared Managers (Sttop5.Shared namespace)

| Manager | Type | Dependencies | Notes |
|---------|------|-------------|-------|
| `GameBootstrapper` | `Singleton<GameBootstrapper>` | `SceneLoader`, `ModuleManager` | Platform entry point |
| `SceneLoader` | `Singleton<SceneLoader>` | `SceneManager` | Additive scene loading |
| `ModuleManager` | `Singleton<ModuleManager>` | `SceneLoader`, `GameModule` | Module lifecycle |
| `PlayerProfile` | `Singleton<PlayerProfile>` | `SaveSystem`, `GlobalEventBus` | **NEW** shared player data |
| `SaveSystem` | `Singleton<SaveSystem>` | Module save data | **NEW** improved save system |
| `GameModule` | Abstract base class | EventBus | Module lifecycle |
| `HomeManager` | `GameModule` | `BuildingManager`, `ResourceManager`, `ModuleManager`, `SaveSystem` | HomeBase module |

---

## 6. Player Data / Save System References

### Duplicate Save Systems - CONFLICT
This is a critical issue. There are **two separate save systems** that compete:

**Legacy:** `Assets/Scripts/Save/SaveSystem.cs` (namespace `TowerDefense.Save`)
- Used by: `PlayerLevelSystem`, `PlayerWallet`, `QuestPanel`, `AchievementPanel`
- File: `savedata.json` in `Application.persistentDataPath/Save/`
- Structure: `GameSaveData` with `level`, `hero`, `settings`, `player`, `quest` sub-data

**Shared:** `Assets/_Shared/Save/SaveSystem.cs` (namespace `Sttop5.Shared.Save`)
- Used by: `HomeManager`, `PlayerProfile`, `ModuleManager`
- File: `gamesave.json` in `Application.persistentDataPath/Save/`
- Structure: `GameSaveData` with `version`, `player`, `settings`, `lastActiveModuleId`, `moduleData` (list of `ModuleSaveEntry`)

**The `PlayerWallet` and `PlayerLevelSystem`** have no save-game persistence except through the legacy `SaveSystem`. They do not persist to `PlayerProfile`.

---

## 7. UnityEngine.UI / Canvas References

The tower defense codebase has heavy Canvas/UI coupling:

1. **Hardcoded GameObject path lookups** (major migration blocker):
   ```csharp
   GameObject.Find("画布/塔选择面板")     // TowerSlot.cs
   GameObject.Find("画布/塔信息面板")      // TowerSlot.cs
   GameObject.Find("Canvas/TowerSelectPanel")  // TowerSlot.cs (fallback)
   GameObject.Find("Canvas/TowerInfoPanel")    // TowerSlot.cs (fallback)
   GameObject.Find("火把")                   // ShopPanel.cs, AchievementPanel.cs, QuestPanel.cs
   GameObject.Find("背景")                    // ShopPanel.cs, AchievementPanel.cs, QuestPanel.cs
   GameObject.Find("BuildSlots") / "建造槽"   // LevelBuilder.cs
   FindObjectOfType<Canvas>()                // LightningSkillController.cs
   ```

2. **Direct `FindObjectOfType<Canvas>()`** in:
   - `EnemyHealth.cs` - creates health bar UI
   - `BuildButtonManager.cs` - spawns build buttons
   - `LightningSkillController.cs` - creates screen flash UI

3. **UI element types used:** `Text`, `Image`, `Button`, `Slider`, `Toggle`, `Dropdown`, `Outline`, `CanvasGroup`, `ScrollRect` (implied)

---

## 8. Namespace Analysis for Module Migration

### Namespace Map

| Namespace | Files | Type |
|-----------|-------|------|
| `TowerDefense.Core` | 6 | Legacy core |
| `TowerDefense.Data` | 10 | Legacy data |
| `TowerDefense.Data.Config` | 3 | Legacy config |
| `TowerDefense.Enemy` | 6 | Legacy enemy |
| `TowerDefense.Hero` | 2 | Legacy hero |
| `TowerDefense.Map` | 2 | Legacy map |
| `TowerDefense.Save` | 2 | Legacy save |
| `TowerDefense.Skill` | 4 | Legacy skill |
| `TowerDefense.Tower` | 8 | Legacy tower |
| `TowerDefense.UI` | 15 | Legacy UI |
| `TowerDefense.Utils` | 3 | Legacy utils |
| `TowerDefense.Wave` | 1 | Legacy wave |
| `TowerDefense.Editor` | 1 | Legacy editor |
| `Sttop5.Shared.Core` | 5 | Shared infrastructure |
| `Sttop5.Shared.Save` | 2 | Shared save |
| `Sttop5.Shared.Player` | 1 | Shared player |
| `Sttop5.Modules.HomeBase` | 6 | HomeBase module |
| (global namespace) | 5 | Un-namespaced scripts |

---

## 9. What Needs to Change to Make it a Loadable Module Under HomeBase

### Critical Blockers

1. **No `GameModule` subclass exists for TowerDefense.** Need to create `TowerDefenseGameModule : GameModule` that:
   - Has `_moduleId = "towerdefense"`
   - Has `_sceneName = "GameScene"` (or whatever the tower defense scene is called)
   - Implements `GetModuleSaveData()` and `RestoreModuleSaveData()` for save/load
   - Overrides `Activate()` to initialize game state
   - Overrides `Deactivate()` to clean up

2. **Hardcoded scene references everywhere.** All direct `SceneManager.LoadScene()` calls need to be replaced by `SceneLoader.LoadSceneAdditive()` through the module system.

3. **Singleton management conflict.** There are two `Singleton` classes (legacy `TowerDefense.Core.Singleton` and shared `Sttop5.Shared.Core.Singleton`). These are separate and will result in duplicate manager instances if both initialize.

4. **Duplicate save systems.** `TowerDefense.Save.SaveSystem` and `Sttop5.Shared.Save.SaveSystem` both exist with different data structures. The tower defense game needs to migrate to the shared save system.

5. **Duplicate player data.** `TowerDefense.Data.PlayerWallet` + `TowerDefense.Data.PlayerLevelSystem` vs `Sttop5.Shared.Player.PlayerProfile`. The tower defense code should use `PlayerProfile` for cross-module persistence and `PlayerWallet`/`PlayerLevelSystem` only for in-game session state.

6. **Hardcoded GameObject path lookups.** `GameObject.Find("画布/...")` and `GameObject.Find("Canvas/...")` throughout UI scripts will break if the Canvas structure differs when loaded additively.

7. **Scene-dependent initialization.** `GameManager.Start()` checks `sceneName == "GameScene"` to auto-start the level. This logic needs to be triggered by the module system instead.

8. **Scene files are missing.** No `.unity` scene files exist in `Assets/Scenes/`. These need to be created.

### Key Migration Steps Summary

1. Create `TowerDefenseGameModule` class inheriting from `GameModule`
2. Migrate all `SceneManager.LoadScene()` calls to `SceneLoader.LoadSceneAdditive()`
3. Refactor UI to not use hardcoded path lookups (use serialized references or dependency injection)
4. Resolve the singleton conflict between legacy and shared Singletons
5. Migrate save data to use the shared `SaveSystem` with module save entries
6. Replace direct `PlayerWallet`/`PlayerLevelSystem` references with `PlayerProfile` for cross-module data
7. Register the tower defense module with `ModuleManager` during initialization
8. Create the actual Unity scene files

### Potential Circular Dependencies
- None detected explicitly, but the **dual singleton pattern** could cause initialization order issues if both `TowerDefense.Core.Singleton` and `Sttop5.Shared.Core.Singleton` instances reference each other
- `GameManager` references `WaveManager` (via static Instance) and vice versa (WaveManager calls GameManager) - this is fine as long as lifecycle is managed

---

## 10. Summary of Key Findings

- **68 C# scripts** in TowerDefense namespace, **9 in _Shared**, **10 in _Modules/HomeBase**
- **GameManager** is the central controller with tight coupling to scene management
- **Two parallel save systems** and **two parallel player data systems** exist - this is the **most critical issue** for module migration
- **Two separate Singleton implementations** exist in different namespaces
- **Heavy hardcoded GameObject.Find() calls** for UI references that will break under additive scene loading
- **No scene files exist** - the game references "GameScene" and "MainMenu" by name in code but the actual `.unity` files are missing (likely gitignored or not yet created)
- **AI folder is empty**
- **HomeBase module** already has the `PortalBuilding` concept that triggers `ModuleManager.ActivateModule()` - this is the intended entry point for the tower defense module
- **The wave/tower/enemy systems** are well-encapsulated in their own namespaces and should require relatively little refactoring for modularization

# Comprehensive Tower Defense Codebase Analysis

## 1. Project Architecture Overview

This is a Unity 2D tower defense game (namespace `TowerDefense`) that is being migrated into a modular game platform ("sttop5") with:
- **`Assets/_Shared/`** - Shared infrastructure (module system, save system, player profile)
- **`Assets/_Modules/HomeBase/`** - Home base hub module (partially implemented)
- **`Assets/Scripts/`** - Tower defense game scripts (the legacy standalone game)

---

## 2. All C# Scripts and Their Responsibilities

### CORE (`Assets/Scripts/Core/`)

| File | Class & Name | Key Methods | Dependencies |
|------|-------------|-------------|--------------|
| `GameManager.cs` | `GameManager : Singleton<GameManager>` | `Awake()`, `Start()`, `LoadLevel()`, `StartGame()`, `PauseGame()`, `ResumeGame()`, `GameOver()`, `RestartGame()`, `AddGold()`, `SpendGold()`, `TakeDamage()`, `Heal()`, `IncrementWave()`, `AddKill()` | `LevelData`, `LevelBuilder`, `EventBus`, `PlayerLevelSystem`, `GameState` enum |
| `EventBus.cs` | `EventBus` (static) | `Subscribe<T>()`, `Unsubscribe<T>()`, `Publish<T>()` | None (pure static events) |
| `ObjectPool.cs` | `ObjectPool : Singleton<ObjectPool>` | `Get()`, `Return()`, `Preload()`, `ClearPool()`, `ClearAllPools()` | `Singleton` |
| `PlayerLevelSystem.cs` | `PlayerLevelSystem : Singleton<PlayerLevelSystem>` | `AddExp()`, `SetLevelData()`, `LoadFromSave()`, `PersistToSave()` | `SaveSystem`, `EventBus` |
| `PlayerWallet.cs` | `PlayerWallet : Singleton<PlayerWallet>` | `AddGold()`, `SpendGold()`, `AddDiamond()`, `SpendDiamond()`, `AddStamina()`, `SpendStamina()` | `EventBus` |
| `Singleton.cs` | `Singleton<T> : MonoBehaviour` | `Awake()`, `OnDestroy()`, static `Instance` property | None |

**Key Insight:** `GameManager` is the central orchestrator. It manages game state, gold, life, waves, and triggers scene loading via `SceneManager.LoadScene()`. It has its own `EventBus` reference pointing to `TowerDefense.Core.EventBus` (the static one from the legacy code, not the shared event bus).
